zh.lifeSummary: 當John Goring II於1424年出生在英國素可伯頓 煙雨 科茨時，他的父親John Goring32歲，母親Agnes24歲。他於1447年之前與Margaret Radmylde在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1495年在他的家鄉享年71歲。

nameMeanings.name: Goring
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places in Oxfordshire and West Sussex named Goring, from Old English Gāringas ‘people of Gāra’, a short form of various compound names with the first element gār ‘spear’.

variants.name: Goering
meanings: topographic name derived from Slavic gora ‘mountain, hill’. Compare Goring .

variants.name: Gorringe
meanings: English (Surrey and Suffolk): variant of   Goring  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Goring II was born in 1424, in Burton with Coates, Sussex, England, his father, John Goring, was 32 and his mother, Agnes, was 24. He married Margaret Radmylde before 1447, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in 1495, in his hometown, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Goring II est né en 1424, à Burton with Coates, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, John Goring, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Agnes, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Radmylde avant 1447, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1495, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 71 ans.

Er hat vor 1447 in England Margaret Radmylde geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1495 im Alter von 71 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

Lui sposato Margaret Radmylde prima del 1447, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1495, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 71 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: John Goring II(이)가 1424년 영국 수세스 버턴 위스 코츠에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Goring(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1447년 이전 영국에서 Margaret Radmylde(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1495년 그의 고향에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Goring II nasceu em 1424, em Burton with Coates, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Goring, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Agnes, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Radmylde antes 1447, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1495, em sua cidade natal, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Goring II родился в 1424 г. в местности буртон вит коэитс, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени John Goring было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Radmylde перед 1447 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1495 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 71 год.

Se casó con Margaret Radmylde antes de 1447, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1495, en su pueblo, a la edad de 71 años.
